expectations.text: Does NOT add updateLocation call to handleSpaceSelect
expectations.evidence: Explicitly: 'This is explicitly documented as Common Mistake #1 in the Presence Safety Skill.' Zero code changes to handleSpaceSelect.

expectations.text: Identifies that handleEnterSpace already calls safeUpdateLocation
expectations.evidence: Traced full call flow with line numbers: ModernFloorPlan.handleEnterSpace -> await updateLocation(spaceId) at line 419.

expectations.text: Explains that adding a second call would create duplicate API requests
expectations.evidence: Listed 4 consequences: double API calls, race conditions, optimistic update conflicts, regression to previously fixed bug.

expectations.text: Proposes alternative approaches for the lag issue
expectations.evidence: Proposed moving onSpaceSelect before await updateLocation for optimistic UI feedback. Also suggested debugging with Network tab + console timing first.

notes: Perfect. Cited Rule 2 and Common Mistake #1 by name. Referenced recent commit ac5c7bd that fixed this exact bug.
